whyUs.title: Why choose Rent Car Tirana?
whyUs.subtitle: We offer the best car rental service in Tirana. With our modern fleet and 24/7 service, your journey starts with confidence.

items.title: Clear pricing
items.desc: No hidden fees. The price you see is the final price.

items.title: 24/7 support
items.desc: We are always available for any of your needs.

items.title: Insurance included
items.desc: All cars come with full insurance included.

items.title: Flexibility
items.desc: Pick up and return the car wherever you need.

guarantees.title: Price guarantee
guarantees.desc: If you find a lower price elsewhere, we match it unconditionally.

guarantees.title: No hidden fees
guarantees.desc: The final price includes everything: tax, basic insurance and delivery.

guarantees.title: Free cancellation
guarantees.desc: Cancel free up to 48 hours before pickup. No risk, no penalties.

items.question: How does booking work?
items.answer: Choose your car, fill in the booking form with dates and your information, and confirm. You will receive a confirmation email immediately.

items.question: What documents are required?
items.answer: You need a valid driver's license (minimum 1 year), identity card or passport, and a credit/debit card for the deposit.

items.question: Can I pick up the car from the airport?
items.answer: Yes! We offer pickup and return directly at Mother Teresa International Airport at no extra cost.

items.question: What happens if the car breaks down?
items.answer: We have 24/7 assistance service. We will immediately send you help or a replacement car at no extra cost.

items.question: Can I cancel my booking?
items.answer: Yes, you can cancel free of charge up to 24 hours before the pickup date. After that, a cancellation fee applies.

cta.title: Have questions? Contact us!
cta.subtitle: We are available 24/7 to help you

fleet.title: Our Fleet
fleet.subtitle: Choose the right car from {{count}} available models
fleet.noResults: No cars found with the selected filters.

faqItems.question: How can I filter cars?
faqItems.answer: Use the filters above the list to choose category, transmission, fuel type and desired price.

faqItems.question: Can I book online?
faqItems.answer: Yes, every car has a 'Book now' button that takes you directly to the booking form.

faqItems.question: What does 'Reserved' mean?
faqItems.answer: The car is currently unavailable for the current dates. You can contact us for availability on other dates.

features.title: Standard equipment included with {{brand}} {{model}}:
features.extrasNote: Extras can be selected during booking

age.title: Age requirements
age.text: Minimum age 21. Drivers aged 21-25 may have a young driver surcharge.

license.title: Driver's license
license.text: License must have been held for at least 1 year. International licenses accepted.

fuel.title: Fuel
fuel.text: Car is delivered with a full tank. Customer is required to return it full or pay a refueling fee.

mileage.title: Mileage
mileage.text: Unlimited mileage for rentals over 3 days. 1-2 days: 300km/day applies.

cancellation.title: Cancellation
cancellation.text: Free cancellation up to 48 hours before pickup. After that, a 30% fee applies.

about.title: About this car
about.text: {{brand}} {{model}} ({{year}}) is an excellent choice for rental in Tirana and Albania. Category {{category}} with {{transmission}} and {{fuel}} fuel — comfortable for city roads, highways and inter-city trips. With {{seats}} seats and {{luggage}} suitcases of space, suitable for groups and families.

support.question: Have questions about this car?
support.available: Our team is available 24/7 to help you

booking.dateTaken: Car is taken on the selected dates

faqItems.question: Is insurance included?
faqItems.answer: Yes, all our cars come with basic insurance included. You can add extra insurance during booking.

faqItems.question: What happens with damages?
faqItems.answer: Each car has a security deposit. Minor damages are covered by insurance. We recommend full coverage.

faqItems.question: Can I pick up the car from the airport?
faqItems.answer: Yes, we offer free pickup from Tirana International Airport. Book on the reservation page.
